name: Database Schema Designer
description: Design database schemas with tables, relationships, and indexes

agents.name: Schema Designer
agents.purpose: Design the database schema based on requirements
agents.system_prompt_hint: Design a normalized database schema. Define tables, columns, types, constraints, primary keys, foreign keys, and indexes. Consider query patterns for performance. Follow normalization best practices.

agents.name: Migration Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write SQL migration scripts (CREATE TABLE, ALTER TABLE, CREATE INDEX). Include both up and down migrations. Add comments explaining design decisions.

author: agentfactory
